about.bio: A dedicated Cybersecurity Specialist and Ethical Hacker driven by a passion for digital defense. As a lifelong knowledge seeker, I specialize in identifying vulnerabilities and securing complex infrastructures. Committed to constant learning, I stay ahead of threats to safeguard data integrity and user trust.
about.name: Mohamed Aasiq
about.title: Cybersecurity Specialist | Ethical Hacker

experience.desc: Leading a wellness enterprise as Managing Director — overseeing full business operations, team management, client relations, and strategic growth. Applied cybersecurity best practices to protect customer data and digital infrastructure.
achievements: Founded and scaled the business from 0 to operational within 6 months
Implemented digital security protocols for client data protection
Built and managed a team of 8 employees

experience.desc: Managed 50+ Amazon SKUs — resolved suppressed listings, optimised inbound shipments to cut shipping costs, maintained Star seller rating by handling policy appeals, and automated daily sales reporting via Excel Macros.
achievements: Managed 50+ Amazon SKUs across multiple categories
Reduced shipping costs by optimising inbound shipments
Automated daily sales reporting via Excel Macros

experience.desc: Managed inventory control, stock audits, vendor coordination, and merchandising for a retail & wholesale outlet.
achievements: Coordinated with 10+ vendors for timely restocking
